name: Carlos
text: Our property was badly in need of deep maintenance, so we hired a complete concrete pressure washing. The transformation is absolutely remarkable. The concrete driveway is bright and slip-free, and they treated areas around our garden safely using low pressure to prevent any damage. They were highly professional, arrived precisely on time, and completely flushed out the downspouts while protecting our flowerbeds from any debris. This is easily the most reliable and thorough pressure washing company in the area.

name: Cherrin
text: 5 Stars! Sunde Surface Cleaning did an amazing job pressure washing my driveway and cleaning up my back yard. The difference is night and day — everything looks fresh, bright, and brand new. They were on time, professional, and incredibly thorough. I’m genuinely impressed with the quality of their work and highly recommend them to anyone who needs reliable surface cleaning.

name: JJ
text: Oskar came to clean my property and I was extremely pleased with the results. He is a very hard-working individual while the results back that up. They were unmatched from any other company we’ve used.

name: Silvia
text: Oskar was very professional and transparent with his prices! I will definitely be using this service again!

name: Lauren
text: Professional, friendly and efficient cleaning service. Our decks look amazing!

name: Sarah
text: Sunde Surface Cleaning did a great job pressure washing our patio, driveway and deck - very professional and thorough.

name: Paul
text: Happy with the outcome and job done by this youthful contractor. Glad he can accept all types of payment.
